_comment: SAMPLE schema for the Long Island fishing-report feed. This file uses fictional shops/text to document the format only. Generate the real feed with tools/li_report_scraper.py (it writes data/li_report.json, which is gitignored). Point secrets.REPORT_FEED_URL at wherever you host the real file.
source: On The Water - Long Island & NYC Fishing Report

north-shore.label: LI Sound / North Shore

reports.text: Fluke action improving on the flats; porgies stacking up on the rock piles. Bass are on a night bite in the harbor mouth.

north-shore.summary: Fluke, Porgy, Striped Bass active. Fluke action improving on the flats.

south-shore-bays.label: South Shore Bays

reports.text: Light-tackle fluke and sea bass in the channels. Snappers thick along the docks for the kids.

south-shore-bays.summary: Fluke, Sea Bass, Snapper active. Light-tackle fluke and sea bass in the channels.

inlets.label: Inlets

reports.text: Bass and blues on the outgoing tide around the jetty. Watch the wind-over-tide chop on a strong ebb.

inlets.summary: Striped Bass, Bluefish active. Bass and blues on the outgoing tide.

ocean.label: Ocean / Beaches

reports.text: Blues filling the rips close to shore; a few bass at first light. Bonito showing on the troll offshore.

ocean.summary: Bluefish, Bass, Bonito active. Blues filling the rips close to shore.

peconics.label: Peconics / The Forks

reports.text: Steady fluke and porgy inshore; a surprise weakfish or two on the drift near the shipping channel.

peconics.summary: Fluke, Porgy, Weakfish active. Steady fluke and porgy inshore.
